name: TestGetWaitPDUsFrameData
title: TestGetWaitPDUsFrameData
description: If a valid PDU is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the message’s, packet’s or frame’s content that contained the PDU can be called up with form 1-3.
Form 4-6 can only be used for joined events. The number of the joined event (return value of TestJoin...) is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: frame
parameters.description: Message variable of type CAN message, Ethernet Packet or FlexRay frame that should be filled in with this function.
